behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files (pod-template-file, values.yaml, values.schema.json, NOTES.txt) and config paths (workers.celery.extraContainers, workers.kubernetes.extraContainers, workers.extraContainers) that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (new paths, priority, deprecation warning) without specifying exact lines or code edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check rendered YAML behavior and schema/values keys generically; multiple implementations (default/or/if) would satisfy the assertions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke `helm template` subprocess and parse rendered YAML output, plus inspect JSON/YAML structure.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests require actual rendering behavior (sidecar-k8s container present, priority over legacy) that can't be faked by stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover new path, priority, legacy fallback, deprecation warning, schema updates, and values.yaml defaults.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly sectioned with FAIL-TO-PASS and PASS-TO-PASS comment headers and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is Helm chart configuration, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and config keys match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to investigate but does not pinpoint exact lines; localization within those files remains the agent's task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch is localized to specific template/schema/values sections without full-file rewrites.
